semantic_description: The function scans a nonempty integer array using a Boyer-Moore majority-candidate style loop. It initializes candidate to the first element and count to 1, then iterates i from 1 up to n-1, updating only scalar locals based on count==0, a[i]==candidate, or the mismatch case. The input array is read-only and must be preserved. The return value is specified by the Coq recursive function majority_candidate_spec over the full input list. The loop can be skipped when n == 1.
